description: 103 binary pass/fail assertions for repo structural integrity across 22 categories. Run via evals/structural/runner.sh. Split into modular category files for LAW 9 compliance.

categories.skill-structure: Every skill has required files and valid format
categories.tooling: Shell scripts are correct and robust
categories.security: No unsafe patterns or exposed secrets
categories.portability: Works on clean machines without assumptions

assertions.assertion: Every directory in skills/ has a SKILL.md file
assertions.check: for d in skills/*/; do [ -f "$d/SKILL.md" ] || echo "FAIL: $d"; done

assertions.assertion: Every SKILL.md has required frontmatter: name, description, metadata
assertions.check: grep -l '^name:' skills/*/SKILL.md | wc -l should equal skill count

assertions.assertion: No skill file exceeds 750 lines (LAW 9)
assertions.check: find skills/ -name '*.md' -exec wc -l {} + | awk '$1 > 750'

assertions.assertion: No skill imports from another skill directory (self-contained)
assertions.check: grep -r 'skills/[a-z]' skills/ --include='*.md' should not reference sibling skills

assertions.assertion: All shell scripts use #!/usr/bin/env bash or #!/usr/bin/env sh (never #!/bin/bash)
assertions.check: grep -rl '#!/bin/bash' . --include='*.sh' should return nothing

assertions.assertion: Every skill with commands/ dir has at least one .md file in it
assertions.check: for d in skills/*/commands/; do [ -d "$d" ] && ls "$d"*.md >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "FAIL: $d"; done

assertions.assertion: marketplace.json is valid JSON
assertions.check: jq . .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > /dev/null

assertions.assertion: Every skill directory in skills/ has an entry in marketplace.json
assertions.check: Compare ls skills/ count vs jq '.plugins | length' marketplace.json

assertions.assertion: Every skill path in marketplace.json exists on disk
assertions.check: jq -r '.plugins[].skills[]' marketplace.json | while read p; do [ -d "$p" ] || echo "FAIL: $p"; done

assertions.assertion: No duplicate plugin names in marketplace.json
assertions.check: jq -r '.plugins[].name' marketplace.json | sort | uniq -d should be empty

assertions.assertion: All .sh files pass bash -n syntax check
assertions.check: find . -name '*.sh' -exec bash -n {} \;

assertions.assertion: All .sh files use set -euo pipefail or equivalent
assertions.check: grep -L 'set -e' tools/*.sh should be empty (or use errexit)

assertions.assertion: index-sync.sh --generate produces valid INDEX.md matching skills/ on disk
assertions.check: Run index-sync.sh, compare output skill count to ls skills/ count

assertions.assertion: common.sh sources correctly from repo root and from tools/ subdirectory
assertions.check: cd repo-root && source tools/lib/common.sh && type skippy_pass

assertions.assertion: install.sh handles re-install over existing installation without data loss
assertions.check: Install, modify installed file, re-install, verify modification is backed up

assertions.assertion: uninstall.sh removes BOTH symlinked AND copied skill installations
assertions.check: Install via copy, run uninstall, verify directory is gone

assertions.assertion: install.sh and uninstall.sh are idempotent (running twice produces same result)
assertions.check: Run install twice, verify no errors. Run uninstall twice, verify no errors.

assertions.assertion: All scripts work in non-interactive mode (no blocking read without -t check)
assertions.check: grep -n 'read ' tools/*.sh should all have -t 0 guard or equivalent

assertions.assertion: CLAUDE.md file tree matches actual directory structure
assertions.check: Extract paths from CLAUDE.md tree, verify each exists on disk

assertions.assertion: All file paths referenced in CLAUDE.md Key Files table exist
assertions.check: Extract paths from Key Files table, verify each exists

assertions.assertion: INDEX.md lists the same skills as ls skills/
assertions.check: Compare INDEX.md skill names to directory listing

assertions.assertion: CONVENTIONS.md exists and references current upstream sources
assertions.check: Verify upstream entries match upstreams/ directory

assertions.assertion: No .env files are tracked in git
assertions.check: git ls-files '*.env' should be empty

assertions.assertion: .gitignore covers .env, *.key, *.pem, node_modules, .DS_Store
assertions.check: grep patterns in .gitignore

assertions.assertion: No hardcoded IP addresses, tokens, or passwords in skill files
assertions.check: grep -r 'password\|token\|api_key\|secret' skills/ --include='*.md' should find only documentation references

assertions.assertion: No absolute paths to user home directories in skill files (no /Users/rico, /home/rico)
assertions.check: grep -r '/Users/rico\|/home/rico' skills/ should be empty

assertions.assertion: All skills use $HOME or ~ instead of hardcoded home paths
assertions.check: Same as above -- verify relative references

assertions.assertion: No bun/node/python version pinning that would break on clean machines
assertions.check: Check for version-specific requires in scripts

assertions.assertion: Every skill SKILL.md has a ## Commands or ## For Agents section
assertions.check: grep -L '## Commands\|## For Agents' skills/*/SKILL.md

assertions.assertion: marketplace.json plugin descriptions match SKILL.md descriptions
assertions.check: Compare description field in marketplace vs SKILL.md frontmatter
